Business: Spandana Sphoorty Financial Limited engages in the microfinance business in India. The company provides joint liability group based microfinance for women entrepreneurs; loans against the property; nano enterprise loans; and individual loans. It serves low-income customers in semi-urban and rural areas. Spandana Sphoorty Financial Limited was found…

  Current: 3.63 %  (+0.00% vs prior)
  India impact: Higher Fed rate → capital flows to USD, EM selling pressure; cuts → EM relief rally

  Current: 16.59  (+0.85% vs prior)
  India impact: High VIX → risk-off, FII sell EMs including India; low VIX → risk-on, inflows

  Current: 4.47 %
  India impact: Rising US 10Y → India bonds less attractive, FII debt outflows; falling → inflows
